user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Levi's
Product type: 501 Original jeans
Tone: authentic, classic, rugged
Visual style: Clean, vintage-inspired imagery with a focus on denim texture and timeless Americana aesthetics.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with lifestyle authenticity
Format: image

brief.headline: Buttoned Up Since '46
brief.caption: A timeless shot of a young cowboy leaning against a rustic wooden fence, his 501 jeans dusted with the earth, capturing the spirit of Americana and rugged individuality.
brief.visual_style: Clean, vintage-inspired imagery with a focus on denim texture and timeless Americana aesthetics.
brief.typography_style: Bold slab serif with a vintage touch, reminiscent of old Americana signage
brief.color_scheme: Indigo blue, rustic brown, and crisp white
